recommendations.title: Outlaw
recommendations.overview: A group of people who feel betrayed by their government and let down by their police force form a modern-day outlaw posse in order to right what they see as the wrongs of society.

recommendations.title: American Hero
recommendations.overview: Melvin, a reluctant hero who is far from super, has been suppressing his telekinetic powers for years with booze, drugs, and women. In the process, he has failed at practically everything, most of all as a parent to his son. After a brush with death,

recommendations.title: The Football Factory
recommendations.overview: The Football Factory is more than just a study of the English obsession with football violence, it's about men looking for armies to join, wars to fight and places to belong. A forgotten culture of Anglo Saxon males fed up with being told they're not

recommendations.title: The Business

recommendations.title: Baby Driver
recommendations.overview: After being coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver finds himself taking part in a heist doomed to fail.

recommendations.title: Divorce Italian Style
recommendations.overview: Ferdinando Cefalù is desperate to marry his cousin, Angela, but he is married to Rosalia and divorce is illegal in Italy. To get around the law, he tries to trick his wife into having an affair so he can catch her and murder her, as he knows he would

recommendations.title: Rush Hour
recommendations.overview: When Hong Kong Inspector Lee is summoned to Los Angeles to investigate a kidnapping, the FBI doesn't want any outside help and assigns cocky LAPD Detective James Carter to distract Lee from the case. Not content to watch the action from the sidelines

recommendations.title: The Bag Man
recommendations.overview: A criminal waits in a seedy motel for his boss after killing several men to steal a bag.

recommendations.title: Point of No Return

recommendations.title: Defendor
